summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sales Workflow features: Assignment Settings (4 modes), Call-based Pipeline Stages, Lead-to-Client Conversion, Clients Page, and Customers (renamed from Contacts). All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - navigation, Pipeline stages, Leads dropdown with Convert option, Clients page with stats, Assignment Settings on Organization page.

minor.issue: Does not check if lead is already converted - allows re-conversion which creates duplicate clients
Uses query parameter (?stage=X) instead of request body - works but inconsistent with other PUT endpoints

issues: Console warning: <span> cannot be a child of <option> in select dropdown - minor React hydration warning

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/assignment-settings - Returns mode and org settings
Backend: PUT /api/assignment-settings - Manual mode works
Backend: PUT /api/assignment-settings - Round robin mode works
Backend: PUT /api/assignment-settings - Territory mode with mappings works
Backend: PUT /api/assignment-settings - Default agent mode works
Backend: Assignment settings requires auth (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/deals - Pipeline loads deals
Backend: POST /api/deals - Create deal with call-based stage
Backend: PUT /api/leads/{id}/pipeline-stage - All 8 call-based stages work (new, contacted, no_answer, interested, follow_up, booked, won, lost)
Backend: POST /api/leads/{id}/convert - Converts lead to client with services
Backend: GET /api/clients - Paginated clients list with structure validation
Backend: GET /api/clients/{id} - Single client detail
Backend: Clients API requires auth (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/contacts - Contacts API works (UI shows as Customers)
Frontend: Login flow works
Frontend: Navigation shows 'Customers' item (renamed from Contacts)
Frontend: Navigation shows new 'Clients' item
Frontend: Pipeline page shows all 8 call-based stages
Frontend: Leads dropdown has 'Convert to Client' option
Frontend: Clients page loads with Total Clients, Total Revenue, Active Services stats
Frontend: Clients table shows customer name, company, services, total value, converted date
Frontend: Organization page has Assignment Settings section
Frontend: Assignment Settings shows all 4 modes (manual, round_robin, territory, default_agent)
Frontend: Territory mode shows state/city/agent inputs
Frontend: Assignment settings save works (toast confirmation)
Frontend: Customers page (formerly Contacts) loads with Add Customer and Import Excel buttons
critical_code_review_comments: AssignmentSettings.jsx line 181: Select option contains <span> wrapper from dynamic content - causes React hydration warning but doesn't break functionality
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_Convert Lead entries during conversion tests, 4 clients exist from conversion testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales workflow features fully tested: Assignment Settings on /organization page supports 4 modes (manual, round_robin, territory, default_agent). Pipeline page has 8 call-based stages. Lead conversion creates clients viewable at /clients. Backend uses /api/contacts but UI shows as 'Customers'. The /api/leads/{id}/pipeline-stage uses query param not body. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_sales_workflow.py

mocked_features.AI_CALLS: AI Call feature remains PLACEHOLDER - Returns pending status with message 'AI Call feature is a placeholder. Integration with voice provider required.'

features_verified.assignment_settings_ui: 4 mode options visible on Organization page
features_verified.assignment_settings_api: GET and PUT endpoints working for all 4 modes
features_verified.pipeline_stages: 8 call-based stages: new, contacted, no_answer, interested, follow_up, booked, won, lost
features_verified.lead_convert_dropdown: Convert to Client option present in Leads dropdown menu
features_verified.clients_page: Shows converted leads with services tracking and total value
